positive: A cyberpunk neon cityscape viewed from a low angle, dominated by geometric structures and holographic advertisements. Rain-slicked streets reflect vibrant neon signs (magenta, cyan, electric blue). High contrast, vaporwave aesthetic, cinematic lighting, digital illustration, ultra-detailed.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural foliage, soft edges, sketch
